response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only incidental Java exposure in past roles without depth or ownership of IDE subsystems.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer education
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of deep JVM or Java/Kotlin enterprise tooling expertise
Absence of Spring, Hibernate, or application server integration experience
IDE internals and language tooling experience not demonstrated or claimed
